vm_cloud_browser_funnel_health.reason: VM Cloud ledger has no browser event rows with metadata.eventName for the requested windows.

backend_contract.funnel_health_addpaymentinfo_rule: Counts rows where VM Cloud ledger metadata.eventName or metadata.event_name equals AddPaymentInfo.
backend_contract.meta_capi_route_support: backend supports AddPaymentInfo in the server CAPI funnel route, but this route is a send path and needs a no-send capture layer before production use.

gtm_biocom.meaning: Current GTM add_payment_info is tied to GA4 or NPay intent style tracking. It is not the same as VM Cloud ledger storage or Meta CAPI server source.

block4_browser_fallback.browser_event_recovery: AddPaymentInfo can be fired as browser pixel fallback.
block4_browser_fallback.vm_cloud_storage: No confirmed evidence that the browser fallback is also stored into VM Cloud ledger as metadata.eventName=AddPaymentInfo.

conclusion.plain_language: 결제수단 선택 신호 자체는 만들 수 있지만, 현재 바이오컴에서는 그 신호가 VM Cloud 원장에 AddPaymentInfo 단계로 남는 연결이 없다.

recommendation: Do not promote current GA4/NPay add_payment_info into Meta CAPI as-is.
Add a VM Cloud no-send intermediate event receiver first.
Let GTM or Imweb code send AddPaymentInfo to VM Cloud only with purchase_candidate=false.
After no-send storage is stable, run one-event Test Events smoke under explicit approval.
